children: Showing how 0° / 90° / 180° / 270° blend with surrounding layout.

segments.text: Showing how 0° / 90° / 180° / 270° blend with surrounding layout.

children: Each orientation value rotates the text AND adjusts the Yoga layout footprint accordingly. At 90° and 270° the node's width and height are swapped so neighbouring elements flow naturally around the rotated block.

children: At 180° the layout footprint is unchanged — only the canvas transform is applied, flipping the text upside-down within the same box.

children: The 180° orientation is useful for mirrored labels, stamp-style annotations, or any design element that needs to appear inverted without changing the space it occupies in the flow.
